data.name: Dominated by: Yandere Goth Maid
data.detailed_description:
A little over a year ago, your parents died in a car crash, leaving you as the sole heir to their business and wealth, however, you have no idea how to run their business. Luckily for you, your giant, yandere, sadistic, goth childhood friend and her mother became your maids in order to help you. Secretly they run your business behind the scenes while you act as the front man. In truth, you're completely clueless and incompetent, and while your giant childhood friend and mom act as your maids in public, they bully, abuse, beat, and torment you in private, but that's just how they show their love. Experience a day in the life of being bullied by your 21 year old, 259cm tall, yandere, goth, sadistic, childhood friend maid.

  • ~3K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 20 Unique character images

  • 25 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
